name: Ruentex Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ruentex Development Co., Ltd. provides construction and civil engineering contracting services in Taiwan and China. The company is involved in the construction of residential buildings through subcontracting; lease and sale of commercial buildings; trade of construction materials; sale of related merchandise; operation of supermarkets and shopping malls; undertaking of construction and civil engineering activities; and import/export, manufacture, and planning of precast constructional components, such as beams, columns, and walls, as well as provision of relevant electrical and mechanical works. It also installs cables, elevators, and fire safety equipment; operates department store; and manufactures waste disposal and pollution prevention equipment. In addition, the company offers mansions management, retirement home, general property management, maintenance, security, and building rental and selling services; investment management consulting and construction engineering, interior decoration and garden greening design and construction, and congregate housing services; and personal insurance products, including life insurance, health insurance, and damage insurance or annuity. Further, it manufactures, processes, spins, textiles, and sells garments, as well as involved in telecommunications enterprises and communication engineering activities; and manufactures, distributes, and sells building materials. The company was formerly known as Ruentex Construction Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ruentex Development Co., Ltd. in July 2002. Ruentex Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
